title: Bug via Web Form
description:
**Bug reported via web form**

**Reporter:** Christopher Michael Dobbins

**Description:**
we need the debugger on every window that can be opened on the website. You need to be able to determine which debugger is being used on each page that the debugger exists. You need to first assume that when a user submits a bug that they are most likely referring to the current page they are on but then if it doesn't make sense investigate all the other pages to do the updates. with each bug that is submitted you should be considering whether or not debug submissions should apply on various pages and you should also be consolidating redundancies but be cautious and think things.

**Submitted:** 2025-10-29T18:56:43.457Z
fix_description: Added bug reporter widget to all 178 HTML pages. Bug reporter automatically captures page URL, so we can determine which page bug was submitted from. Created automation script ADD_BUG_REPORTER_TO_ALL_PAGES.py for future updates.
